{{Quote|Yeah, Chewie, I can see the kid's hurt. After going one on one with a "Cat", he's lucky to be alive|Han Solo, shortly after Luke Skywalker's encounter with Catumen on Tirahnn|<ref name="Star Wars Annual (1977) 1">[[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]]</ref>}}
'''Catumen''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sapient]] [[Feline/Legends|felinoids]] known for the fierce [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] warriors of their [[Species/Legends|species]]. Catuman warriors were raised in the arts of warfare from birth, and were said to be among the deadliest killers in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Several Catuman warriors served as the bodyguards of [[Kharys]], the [[Magister of Skye|Majestrix]] of [[Skye/Legends|Skye]], and ruthlessly hunted down [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] on [[Tirahnn/Legends|Tirahnn]] as part of the Majestrix's scheme to locate [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].
